creator: antoine@FreeBSD.org
text:
There is a problem with libpkg on architectures where ld.bfd is still the default linker:

http://pb2.nyi.freebsd.org/data/120i386-default-PR237387/2019-05-26_20h22m06s/logs/errors/net-snmp-5.7.3_19.log

http://package22.nyi.freebsd.org/data/112amd64-default-PR237387/2019-05-26_20h22m02s/logs/errors/net-snmp-5.7.3_19.log
